hero.title: MOLDURCAVADO MOLDURAS, LDA

about.title: About Us
about.description: Founded with a passion for craftsmanship, Moldurcavado has been providing high-quality wood frames and canvas stretchers for decades. Our mission is to preserve and enhance artwork with the finest materials and traditional techniques.

frames.title: Wood Frames
frames.description: High quality artisan wood frames for all types of art.

stretchers.title: Canvas Stretchers
stretchers.description: Custom wood structures for stretching canvas.
